message:
fix(ci): correct VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json path in cross-platform gate

The CI cross-platform check was looking in artifacts/ subdirectory but the
manifest lives at tests/ext_conformance/VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json. Fixes the
required "Extension test artifacts present" gate check (8/8 required now pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
